explanation: I abstained because the best evidence was not grounded enough to give a stable current answer. Top support: 2022, game, james, september.

support_items.text: Summary: At 6:53 pm on 1 September 2022, James excitedly shared with John that he had completed his Unity strategy game, inspired by games like Civilization and Total War.
